content:
📜 2. How to Track Alignment & RPG Choices (Without Making It a Headache)

📜 Method: Secret Alignment Logs & Choice Registration
✔ Students do NOT know their alignment explicitly.
✔ Instead, they fill out short logs each week tracking their choices.
✔ The professor tracks patterns and assigns secret alignments.

📜 How Students Register RPG Choices
✔ Character Selection – Registered at the start of the semester in a sign-up sheet.
✔ Weekly Major Choices (Rerolls, Sacrifices, Boss Challenges, etc.) – Logged in an “RPG Choices” sheet.
✔ Alignment is tracked automatically based on their playstyle.

📜 Secret Alignment Reveals
✔ At Week 10, students are given a “Hint” at their secret alignment.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 255 (chunk 255/555)
